article.p: This page is rendered by pages/docs/routing/[slug]/Post.js and matches the URL pattern /docs/routing/:slug.

div.style: background: var(--doc-inline-code-bg, #f3f4f6); border: 1px solid var(--doc-border-color, #e5e7eb); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 32px;

p.style: font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--doc-text-color, #6b7280); margin-bottom: 8px;

article.p: The slug is read via getCurrentRoute() in setup():

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

a.style: padding: 6px 12px; background: var(--doc-inline-code-bg); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; color: var(--doc-heading-color);
padding: 6px 12px; background: var(--doc-inline-code-bg); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; color: var(--doc-heading-color);
padding: 6px 12px; background: var(--doc-inline-code-bg); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; color: var(--doc-heading-color);
